description: A dense ink drawing depicting several abstracted human figures seated or reclining in a tightly interlocked composition. The forms are rendered in heavy, overlapping pen strokes that dissolve anatomical detail into a web of dark lines. At least three figures can be discerned, their bodies merging into one another. The overall effect is of compressed energy and tangled human presence, with no identifiable setting or background detail beyond the cross-hatched marks.
